summary: still hold `server.mu` while taking `room.mu` during create/join/reconnect. Those code paths then call room methods that iterate players and call `PlayerSession.Send` while the server lock is still held. Today `Send` is non‑blocking and doesn’t lock, so no deadlock; but this becomes fragile if `Send` ever takes a lock that could be held elsewhere while `room.mu` is held.     - `core/server.go:187`     - `core/server.go:232`     - `core/server.go:397`     - `core/room.go:195`  **Room-side cha
